name: Cornflake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Add the sugar and beat again until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually stir in the flour, cream of tartar, salt, and baking soda until a dough forms.
5. Fold in the crushed corn flakes.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
Source: The Canadian Heritage Cookbook ch.
